commit.message: Removed duplicate VM options from test/hotspot/jtreg/gc/g1/ihop/TestIHOPStatic.java, test/jdk/sun/tools/jstack/DeadlockDetectionTest.java, test/lib/jdk/test/lib/apps/LingeredApp.java, test/lib/jdk/test/lib/cli/CommandLineOptionTest.java. Added duplicate agent options warning to ProcessTools-spawned subprocesses and LingeredApp
8377729: Running jtreg tests with -agent... option causes some tests to fail due to duplicate -agent options provided to a subprocess
